---
## Goal
- Move `AnyAuthenticatedUserId` and `RecoveryUserId` constants from `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/perms` to `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/globals` package across the repository while maintaining typechecking

## Constraints & Preferences
- Change must be applied everywhere in the whole repository
- Project must still typecheck after relocation
- Move both symbols together with all their references updated

## Progress
### Done
- Relocated `AnyAuthenticatedUserId` from `internal/perms/acl.go:12:2` to `globals/boundary_developer_env.go:3:7` using `move_decl` op
- Relocated `RecoveryUserId` from `internal/perms/acl.go:14:2` to `globals/boundary_developer_env.go:5:7` using `move_decl` op
- Verified 4 references for `AnyAuthenticatedUserId` now resolve correctly (1 definition + 3 usages)
- Verified 10 references for `RecoveryUserId` now resolve correctly (1 definition + 9 usages)
- Tests pass in `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/globals`, `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/perms`, and dependent packages

### In Progress
- (none)

### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisons
- Used `move_decl` op with `create_pkg=true` to automatically relocate declarations and update all references
- Created `globals` package if needed for symbol relocation

## Next Steps
- Run full test suite to confirm entire repository still typechecks after this change
- Update any documentation that references the old package path

## Critical Context
- Two symbols moved: `AnyAuthenticatedUserId` (const string) and `RecoveryUserId` (const string)
- All 14 total references across repository were successfully updated (4 for AnyAuthenticatedUserId, 10 for RecoveryUserId)
- Dependencies updated automatically by the tool's move operation with correct package imports

## Relevant Files
- boundary/globals/boundary_developer_env.go: contains relocated constants
- boundary/internal/perms/acl.go: removed constant definitions
- boundary/internal/iam/repository_scope.go: uses AnyAuthenticatedUserId (refs at lines 91, 342)
- boundary/internal/daemon/controller/auth/testing.go: uses AnyAuthenticatedUserId (ref at line 24)
- boundary/internal/daemon/controller/handlers/groups/group_service.go: uses RecoveryUserId (refs at lines 713, 737)
- boundary/internal/daemon/controller/handlers/roles/role_service.go: uses RecoveryUserId (refs at lines 978, 1004)
